anomalies.insight: Serum Ferritin down 22% week-on-week (134 vs 171 same Monday last week) and 2.9σ below range. The weekly comparison confirms Ferritin demand has been declining for at least 7 days — it's not just a Sunday→Monday normalisation. Check if a Ferritin-specific App/web listing issue, pricing change, or slot availability problem occurred in the last week. Escalate to the product team.

CBC via App/web up 15% week-on-week (814 vs 711 same Monday) and 1σ above range — a positive weekly signal. Monday CBC App/web growing week-on-week confirms improved Monday morning App/web demand for diagnostic tests. This may reflect better morning slot availability or effective Monday push notifications. Confirm with the ops and marketing teams.

Advanced Blood Test 1.2 up 232% week-on-week (93 vs 28 same Monday). The weekly jump confirms a new B2B order cycle has been established that wasn't present last Monday at this scale. B2B team to identify whether this is a new account or an existing account that has scaled up.

Confirms Advanced Blood Test 1.2 growth is entirely B2B-driven week-on-week. If this is a recurring Monday corporate order, B2B ops should plan ahead — ensure dedicated Monday phlebo capacity for this client.

Gurgaon 12:00 slot down 68% week-on-week (13 vs 41) and 3.3σ below range. Last Monday had unusually high midday Gurgaon demand; today is well below the historical mean. Check if a Gurgaon B2B client who placed a Monday midday bulk order last week did not repeat, or if 12:00 slot supply in Gurgaon was reduced.

CC_Affiliate up 134% week-on-week (145 vs 62 same Monday) and 1.1σ above range. Affiliate channel growing strongly on a Monday-to-Monday basis confirms a new or expanded affiliate partnership that activated in the last 7 days. Partnerships team to identify the source and formalise if not already done.

Noida Telesales up 49% week-on-week (76 vs 51) and 2.5σ above range. Telesales in Noida growing consistently week-on-week suggests improved agent productivity or a new Noida-specific lead list being worked. Share with Telesales team to understand the driver and replicate in other cities.

Delhi midnight (00:00) down 67% week-on-week (12 vs 36 same Monday). The weekly comparison confirms Delhi late-night bookings are structurally weaker this Monday vs last — last Monday's midnight figure was an anomaly. Consistent with the D-2 signal.

Hyderabad Ekincare channel up 289% week-on-week (35 vs 9) and 2.3σ above range. Combined with the EK-SA-1428-01HC spike in the D-2 view, Ekincare corporate wellness orders are growing strongly week-on-week in Hyderabad. Confirm with the Ekincare partnership team whether a new Hyderabad corporate client was onboarded in the last 7 days.

Kanchipuram B2B up 200% week-on-week (21 vs 7) and 4.2σ above range. Small base but the week-on-week triple in a smaller city points to a new B2B account activated in Kanchipuram in the last 7 days. Ops team to confirm phlebo coverage and document the client.

Bangalore CBC up 23% week-on-week (245 vs 200) and 1.3σ above range. Bangalore CBC is growing sustainably week-on-week — this is consistent with Bangalore's broader city-level strength. Bangalore continues to be the standout city for organic demand growth.

Noida 15:00 slot up 72% week-on-week (31 vs 18) and 4.4σ above range. The weekly comparison confirms the afternoon Noida slot is genuinely growing, not just a Sunday→Monday effect. A new slot opening or afternoon corporate booking cycle in Noida has been established this week.

Noida 20:00 slot up 192% week-on-week (35 vs 12) and 2.4σ above range. Along with the 15:00 signal, Noida afternoon-to-evening slots are significantly stronger this Monday vs last. This suggests either new evening phlebo availability in Noida or a corporate client with afternoon/evening collection requirements.

Gurgaon 14:00 slot down 61% week-on-week (17 vs 43) and 2.1σ below range. Consistent with the Gurgaon 12:00 signal — Gurgaon midday slots are broadly weaker this Monday. A B2B client who drove midday Gurgaon demand last Monday has not repeated this week.

17:00 slot up 14% week-on-week (555 vs 489) and 0.8σ above range. Evening 17:00 growing week-on-week confirms improving Monday evening demand — a positive structural signal. Consider scheduling Monday evening notifications consistently at 16:30-17:00 to amplify this trend.
